ogTitle: Jurien Bay vs Kadathinni: Climate Safety

heading: Jurien Bay vs Kadathinni — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jurien Bay, Western Australia and Kadathinni, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jurien Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kadathinni (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jurien Bay or Kadathinni safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jurien Bay has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Kadathinni scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jurien Bay scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Kadathinni scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jurien Bay or Kadathinni?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jurien Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
